pass_summary: Session-aware shutdown correctly replaces idle timeout with session-checking logic, keepalive is fully removed, and CLI call sites are updated. One missing test for the stale activity path is the only must_fix.

issues.title: Missing test for stale activity shutdown path
issues.description: Task 4 DoD requires 'Test: stale activity check — sessions exist but no HTTP activity for threshold'. All tests set staleActivityMs to 600_000 to disable this path. The stale activity branch in enableSessionAwareShutdown (lines ~105-110 in server.ts diff) that detects crashed clients by checking lastActivityTime >= staleActivityMs is completely untested.
issues.suggested_fix: Add a test in src/sidecar/server.test.ts: insert an active session, set staleActivityMs to 40ms, do NOT send any HTTP requests (so lastActivityTime stays old), wait for check + grace period, assert shutdown fires despite the session being 'active'.

issues.title: Task 1 DoD checkboxes not ticked
issues.description: The 6 DoD checkboxes under Task 1 in the plan are all still unchecked (- [ ]), same for Tasks 2-4. The plan status says COMPLETE and progress tracking shows [x] for all tasks, but the individual DoD items within each task section remain unchecked.
issues.suggested_fix: Tick the DoD checkboxes in the plan file (- [ ] → - [x]) for all completed items under each task.

truths.truth: Sidecar stays alive while any session is active (no 5-minute shutdown)
truths.evidence: enableSessionAwareShutdown checks store.getActiveSessions() every interval. When activeSessions.length > 0 and activity is recent, it sets sessionsEverSeen=true, resets noSessionSince=null, and returns (no shutdown). Test 'should stay alive when active sessions exist' confirms this.

truths.truth: Sidecar shuts down ~60s after the last session ends
truths.evidence: When activeSessions drops to 0 and sessionsEverSeen is true, noSessionSince is set to Date.now(). On subsequent checks, if Date.now() - noSessionSince >= gracePeriodMs, doShutdown() fires. Tests 'should shutdown after grace period with no active sessions' and 'transition flow' confirm this.

truths.truth: Manual start without sessions falls back to 30-minute idle timeout
truths.evidence: When sessionsEverSeen is false, the else branch checks Date.now() - lastActivityTime >= fallbackIdleMs. FALLBACK_IDLE_TIMEOUT_MS is 30 min. Test 'should fallback to idle timeout when no sessions ever created' confirms. Test 'should not fallback to idle when requests keep coming' confirms activity resets prevent premature shutdown.

truths.truth: MCP keepalive ping is removed from MCP server
truths.evidence: startKeepalive function, DEFAULT_KEEPALIVE_INTERVAL_MS constant, and all references (stopKeepalive in SIGTERM/SIGINT/exit handlers) are removed from src/mcp/server.ts. Import removed from test file. Grep for startKeepalive/stopKeepalive across src/ returns zero results.

truths.truth: All existing tests pass (with updated assertions)
truths.evidence: Test file updates replace enableIdleShutdown tests with enableSessionAwareShutdown tests covering session-aware, transition, and hybrid fallback paths. Keepalive tests removed from mcp/server.test.ts. registerMcpCleanupHandlers tests preserved. Runtime verification deferred to CI.
